reviewText: I wanted to try this product for a very specific purpose, I have been looking at facial cleansing wipes to use occasionally at bedtime instead of stripping my face by doing a full wash with cleanser and water. I rarely wear makeup, I spend my energy on finding the best... I wanted to try this product for a very specific purpose, I have been looking at facial cleansing wipes to use occasionally at bedtime instead of stripping my face by doing a full wash with cleanser and water. I rarely wear makeup, I spend my energy on finding the best skincare products for my skin and sunscreen. So at bedtime usually, I’m just taking off sunscreen and the day’s grime, or if I didn’t go out, the day’s moisturizing products. I tried several brands of moist facial cleansing wipes, and they left behind a greasy film and my face still feels like it needs a full wash. I would never want to skip properly cleansing my skin, and I usually do a full routine while I shower, but it would be nice to be able to occasionally do something quicker and more convenient without sacrificing on quality. I was hoping this product might cleanse well without needing to be rinsed or breaking me out on occasions where I want something quick and convenient, or maybe am travelling and need a basic routine. Wow, this product is not only perfect for that, it actually makes my skin soft and clean, you’d never know I skipped my regular cleansing and just used this Bioderma product with a cotton pad before my nighttime moisturizers/serum. It completely takes off the day’s water resistant facial sunscreen and any sweat or grime and leaves my skin very clean, soft, not dry, and it feels like there is no residue whatsoever. I also don’t break out or get clogged pores, it is just a clean, soft texture. One cotton pad with product is all takes for my entire face to look and feel just as clean as if I had used my regular products (a cleansing balm followed by a foaming cleanser and lots of rinsing with water). I have used this micellar water quite a bit since receiving it, and have not broken out or had clogged pores from “cutting corners” so to speak. And it cleanses very well. I can’t believe how well it cleanses without needing to be rinsed, without irritating my skin, without clogging pores or causing breakouts, and is suitable to use and then put on my serum and nighttime moisturizer. I’ve even used it the next morning to remove the nighttime moisturizers and then put on my SPF. I worried that I was going to cause my skin not to look as good if I didn’t properly wash and rinse with water but this product is so amazing. I have not yet used it to see how well it removes makeup since I rarely wear any, but just for skincare and cleansing without a full wash with regular water, it is so amazing. Not going to sugarcoat it, this is me wanting a convenient routine when I travel but this is also me being lazy on nights when I’m very tired or mornings when I am in a hurry. I consider this one of my few holy grail skincare products. I have picked up a smaller size for travel. I will keep this on hand always. I’m not even looking at moist wipes anymore. (This product is more gentle and leaves no residue as compared to a dermatologist recommended brand of face wipes). I’m most surprised that it cleans my face so thoroughly and that not rinsing does not cause any irritation or breakouts. Just wow. Totally worth the price. I was going to try other brands but this product has been so good there is no need to.

reviewText: I’m 52 and post-menopausal, with dry, increasingly sensitive skin, and I’ve used a lot of cleansing oils over the years—especially from Korean brands. Some are too heavy, some don’t rinse cleanly, and some leave a film that makes me want to wash my face again immediately.... I’m 52 and post-menopausal, with dry, increasingly sensitive skin, and I’ve used a lot of cleansing oils over the years—especially from Korean brands. Some are too heavy, some don’t rinse cleanly, and some leave a film that makes me want to wash my face again immediately. This Anua Heartleaf Pore Control Cleansing Oil is one of the few that gets everything right. The texture is beautiful. It’s lightweight and fluid, not thick or overly oily, so it spreads easily across the skin without feeling heavy. It has enough slip to break down makeup and sunscreen quickly, but it doesn’t feel like it’s sitting on top of the skin. What really stands out is how well it emulsifies and rinses clean. As soon as you add water, it turns into a soft, milky consistency and washes away completely. There’s no greasy residue left behind, and my skin feels clean and balanced—not coated or stripped. It removes everything easily, including sunscreen and makeup, without needing to rub or tug at the skin. That’s especially important for me because I’m careful about how much friction I use on my face now. Even though it’s marketed for pore control, it doesn’t feel harsh or drying at all. The heartleaf gives it that calming, skin-friendly feel, and my skin always feels comfortable after using it. No tightness, no irritation—just clean, soft skin. I also like that it works beautifully as part of a double cleanse. It does the heavy lifting in the first step, and then I can follow with a gentle cleanser without feeling like I’m over-cleansing. Another thing worth mentioning is the value. The bottle is a good size, and you only need one or two pumps per use, so it lasts. For the performance you get, it feels like a very solid purchase. Overall, this is an exceptionally well-balanced cleansing oil—effective enough to remove everything, but gentle enough for dry, mature skin. It leaves the skin clean, calm, and comfortable, which is exactly what I want from a first cleanse. This is one of those products that quietly earns a permanent place in the routine because it just works.

reviewTitle: Amazing! Leaves no oily residue behind!
reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 26, 2026
reviewText: Works amazingly well! I’ve always used Boscia’s “makeup breakup” oil cleanser but hated that it leaves a residue behind. The foaming texture feels light and refreshing, and it rinses clean without residue. I spent more time noticing how balanced my skin felt afterward than adjusting the amount used because a small pump already creates a good lather. The fragrance free formula is especially nice for sensitive skin and does not feel harsh during daily use. The combination of hyaluronic acid, ceramides, and niacinamide helps the skin feel hydrated and calm while still controlling shine throughout the day. One thing to keep in mind is that the sixteen ounce bottle is fairly large and takes up a bit more bathroom counter space compared to smaller cleansers. Once incorporated into a routine, though, the size becomes convenient because it lasts a long time. Overall, this is a dependable everyday cleanser that balances effective oil control with a gentle and non drying feel.

reviewText: Eate producto es ideal para piel mixta a grasa He probado varios limpiadores faciales y este realmente cumple lo que promete si tienes piel normal a grasa. Lo que más me gusta es que limpia muy bien el exceso de grasa sin dejar esa sensación tirante que a veces dejan los productos espumosos. Hace espuma ligera (no exagerada), se enjuaga fácil y no deja residuo y tiene ingredientes claves que marcan la diferencia: Contiene 3 ceramidas esenciales que ayudan a mantener la barrera de la piel. Niacinamida, que calma y ayuda con la apariencia de los poros. Ácido hialurónico, que aporta hidratación ligera. Algo importante: no tiene fragancia, lo cual para mí es un punto muy positivo porque reduce el riesgo de irritación. Después de usarlo consistentemente, noto la piel limpia, equilibrada y menos brillante. Lo recomiendo especialmente para: Piel mixta Piel grasa Personas que buscan limpieza efectiva sin sensación agresiva No lo recomendaría si tienes piel muy seca, porque aunque no reseca en exceso, puede que necesites algo más cremoso. En general, excelente relación calidad-precio y el tamaño “value size” rinde bastante.

The addition of ingredients like lactic acid and natural extracts makes it feel more like a complete care product rather than just a basic wash. Another huge plus is the clean ingredient list. It contains no artificial dyes, colors, parabens, gluten, or animal byproducts, which gives me peace of mind knowing I’m using something safe and thoughtful on my body. The texture is smooth, lathers nicely, and a little goes a long way. The scent is light and refreshing not overpowering at all. It leaves you feeling clean, confident, and comfortable all day. Overall, this product is a great choice if you’re looking for a gentle, effective, and clean feminine hygiene solution. reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 26, 2026
reviewText: Not a daily cleanser for sensitive skin but a magnificent exfoliater to gentle exfoliating facial wash if used in small amounts. It doesn't irritate or strip my skin as long as I use in small amounts and not daily, which is impressive considering I have rosacea, hence a... Not a daily cleanser for sensitive skin but a magnificent exfoliater to gentle exfoliating facial wash if used in small amounts. It doesn't irritate or strip my skin as long as I use in small amounts and not daily, which is impressive considering I have rosacea, hence a litte extra sensitive. I use it once or twice a week and thats just right. When I use this exfoliating wash it leaves my face feeling clean, refreshed, and more importantly smooth. I find my skin doesn't feel as textured or oily yet it does so without leaving it dry flaky or patchy, which allows me to put makeup on much more smoothly. Blemishes are also kept in check. It's no miracle but it does help. I even found it works great to exfoliate my dry feet, leaving heals much more smoother. However, less is more with this product. Too much (I mean anything more than a pea size) dries out my skin which in turn activates flakes and boosts oiliness that then gets trapped with the dry flakes which in turn quickly flares up the blemishes. So quantity is key here. Also, note that this is not a foaming cleanser. At least it doesn't really foam up as much as I would like. I miss the big lathering feel and took a min to get use to lack of it. Although this is a good exfoliater I find that this cleanser struggles with washing off makeup completely, especially color correcters and foundation. You will need to use a gentle makeup remover first for better results. Overall, its a good exfoliating cleanser but I wish it was more foamy and strong enough to wash makeup on its own in one go, but since its not my daily cleanser it is not a deal breaker.

reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2026
reviewText: CeraVe Renewing Salicylic Acid Cleanser has become my absolute holy grail skincare product! I've been using it for three months now, and the transformation in my skin has been nothing short of miraculous. This cleanser has earned a permanent spot in my daily routine,... CeraVe Renewing Salicylic Acid Cleanser has become my absolute holy grail skincare product! I've been using it for three months now, and the transformation in my skin has been nothing short of miraculous. This cleanser has earned a permanent spot in my daily routine, and I genuinely can't imagine my skincare regimen without it. I've always struggled with rough, bumpy skin texture and occasional breakouts. I'd tried numerous cleansers that were either too harsh and left my skin feeling stripped and tight, or too gentle and didn't effectively address my concerns. CeraVe has struck the perfect balance. The salicylic acid gently exfoliates and unclogs my pores without causing irritation or over-drying, which is exactly what my skin needed. What sets this cleanser apart is the phenomenal ingredient combination. The hyaluronic acid keeps my skin hydrated and plump, the niacinamide has visibly improved my skin tone and reduced redness, and the ceramides strengthen my skin barrier. I can actually see and feel the difference - my skin is smoother, clearer, and has a healthy glow that I never thought was possible for me. The texture of this cleanser is perfect - it's creamy but not heavy, and it foams up nicely without being stripping. I use it morning and night, and my skin feels thoroughly cleansed but never tight or uncomfortable. It removes all traces of dirt, oil, and even light makeup without any harsh scrubbing. My pores look visibly smaller and cleaner, and I've noticed significantly fewer blackheads on my nose and chin. Within the first two weeks, I noticed my skin texture becoming smoother. The rough patches on my forehead and cheeks started disappearing, and my overall complexion looked more refined. By week six, friends and coworkers were asking me what I'd been doing differently because my skin looked so radiant. That's when I knew this product was truly special. I also love that it's fragrance-free and developed with dermatologists. My skin is somewhat sensitive, and I've never experienced any irritation, redness, or adverse reactions. The bottle is a generous size and lasts for months, making it an incredible value for the quality you're getting. This cleanser works beautifully with the rest of my skincare products and has actually made my other products work better because my skin is properly prepped and exfoliated. I'm absolutely in love with CeraVe, and I recommend it to everyone!

aspects.aspectSummary: Customers find this cleanser effective, describing it as the best face wash that leaves skin feeling clean and works well for acne.
Customers find the cleanser gentle and effective, with their skin feeling refreshed and smoother after use, particularly noting its benefits for oily and sensitive skin.
Customers find the cleanser gentle on their skin, making it feel smooth and soft, with one customer noting it's gentle enough to use twice a day.
Customers find the cleanser moisturizing, noting it doesn't dry out their skin and leaves it hydrated.
Customers appreciate that the cleanser is fragrance-free.
Customers find the cleanser to be good value for money, describing it as an awesome and ideal product for moms on a budget.
Customers report that the cleanser improves their skin's appearance, making it look clearer, brighter, and healthier with a healthy glow.

Customers have mixed experiences with the cleanser's effect on sensitive skin, with some finding it gentle enough for daily use and great for sensitive skin, while others report that it makes their skin burn and itch.

reviewsAISummary: Customers find this cleanser effective for acne and appreciate its gentle exfoliating properties, with one noting it's suitable for daily use. Moreover, the product receives positive feedback for its moisturizing properties, leaving skin hydrated without drying, and its fragrance-free formula. Additionally, customers like its value for money, describing it as an awesome affordable cleanser, and report improved skin appearance with a healthy glow. However, opinions on skin sensitivity are mixed, with some finding it gentle while others report it irritates their skin.

reviewText: Es el mejor limpiador que he probado para mejorar la textura de la piel. El ácido salicílico realmente ayuda con los puntos negros y granitos, pero lo mejor es que no deja la cara reseca ni tirante gracias a las ceramidas. Es suave, no tiene aroma y rinde muchísimo. ¡Un básico imprescindible para mantener la piel limpia y suave!
